name: usb-camera
description: Stream a USB / UVC RGB webcam as MJPEG over HTTP — plug-and-play, no WebRTC and no AES key. Captures /dev/video* with OpenCV (V4L2) and serves a live viewer page plus a raw MJPEG endpoint. The /stream/color path is a drop-in replacement for go2-rc's camera proxy, so it works as the Go2 camera source without the encrypted WebRTC handshake.

variables.name: PORT
variables.description: HTTP port — open http://<device>:<port> to view the feed

variables.name: VIDEO_DEVICE
variables.description: V4L2 device for the webcam (e.g. /dev/video0, or an index like 0). Run `v4l2-ctl --list-devices` on the host if unsure.

variables.name: JPEG_QUALITY
variables.description: MJPEG JPEG quality (1-100; lower = less bandwidth)
